Bash(env -u LD_PRELOAD docker exec gitlab gitlab-rails runner '
project = Project.find_by_full_path(""root/warehouse-frontend"")
if project
  hook = project.hooks.create!(
    url: ""http://192.168.1.74:30088/webhook/gitlab"",
    token: ""warehouse-webhook-secret-2024"",
    pipeline_events: true,
    job_events: true,
    push_events: false,
    enable_ssl_verification: false
  )
  puts ""Webhook created: #{hook.id}""
else
  puts ""Project not found""
end
')

Bash(env -u LD_PRELOAD docker exec gitlab gitlab-rails runner '
project = Project.find_by_full_path(""root/warehouse-frontend"")
pipeline = project.ci_pipelines.order(id: :desc).first
puts ""Pipeline ##{pipeline.id}: #{pipeline.status}""
pipeline.statuses.each do |job|
  puts ""  #{job.name}: #{job.status}""
end
')
